item.title: Claude Opus 4.6 sets new benchmarks
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 achieves state-of-the-art performance on coding benchmarks.

item.title: Claude for Chrome extension update
item.description: New browser extension features for Chrome web store.

item.title: Claude for Excel add-in improvements
item.description: Office add-in gets new formula support in Excel.

item.title: Anthropic partners with university research labs
item.description: New research collaborations to advance AI safety.

item.title: Claude Desktop app adds cowork mode
item.description: Claude Desktop now features a new cowork mode for file management.
